sections.name: Multiple Choice
sections.quote: Section I: Multiple Choice — 60 Questions | 1 Hour 10 Minutes | 66% of Exam Score. Questions require the use of economics content knowledge and reasoning across the range of course topics and skills in skill categories 1, 2, and 3.

sections.name: Free Response
sections.quote: Section II: Free Response — 3 Questions | 1 Hour (includes 10-minute reading period) | 33% of Exam Score. 1 long question (50% of section score) and 2 short questions (25% each of section score).
